ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the retail location where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the product to the retailer */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit from the sale */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* The date and time of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method used for payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the salesperson who processed the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* The tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* A boolean flag indicating if the transaction was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES locations ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The customer's gender */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "segment" TEXT /* The customer segment (e.g., high-value, low-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* The date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retail location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the retail location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the retail location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the retail location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the retail location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the retail location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the retail location is situated */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the manager for the location */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* The date the location opened */,
  "store_size_sqft" INTEGER /* The size of the store in square feet */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the report period */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of products sold for the report period */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied for the report period */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the report period */,
  "total_gross_profit" REAL /* Total gross profit for the report period */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the location for the report */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* The ID of the product for the report */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* The ID of the customer for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the report period */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the report period */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the report period */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the report period */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the location for the report */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* The ID of the product for the report */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* The ID of the customer for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
